2026.05.25.3.title: Location capture on submissions
highlights: Submissions now capture your phone GPS location as evidence of the visit
Location appears on the audit PDF with a Google Maps link reviewers can click
Location capture happens automatically when you reach the review step — no extra taps
If location is unavailable or you decline, your submission still goes through normally
You'll see a confirmation card showing your captured location before you submit

2026.05.25.2.title: Security & reliability fix
highlights: Fixed an issue where the app could occasionally display the wrong official's profile after a long period of inactivity
Improved session handling so your account information is always loaded correctly
If you've been using the app today, please sign out and sign in again to refresh your session

2026.05.25.1.title: Now installable as an app!
highlights: The Tracker is now installable as a mobile app on Android (home screen) and as a desktop app on Windows/Mac
Faster loading and works offline for the app shell
New version notifications when updates are published
Version information is now visible in the footer
